title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.834 - Major Lee Berra memorial highway designated for a portion of I-64 in St. Louis County
text:
227.834.  Major Lee Berra memorial highway designated for a portion of I-64 in St. Louis County. — The portion of Interstate 64 from the Interstate 64 ramp to Interstate 270 continuing east to Spoede Road in St. Louis County shall be designated the "Major Lee Berra Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2023 S.B. 139)
